column3: Re-examine Cache-control - informational, static site caching
Missing Anti-clickjacking Header - Pages cannot send headers; X-Frame-Options + frame-ancestors set on Cloudflare prod
X-Content-Type-Options missing - Pages cannot send headers; set on Cloudflare prod
Information Disclosure Suspicious Comments - JS source comments, no secrets
Strict-Transport-Security not set - Pages cannot send headers; set on Cloudflare prod
CSP header not set - Pages cannot send headers; set on Cloudflare prod via _headers
Storable and Cacheable Content - expected for a static site
Retrieved from Cache - informational, CDN/Pages caching
CSP no-fallback - fires on GitHub 404 pages, not our app
Permissions-Policy not set - Pages cannot send headers; set on Cloudflare prod
Base64 Disclosure - inline data URIs / public Supabase anon key, no secret
X-Frame-Options not set - Pages cannot send headers; set on Cloudflare prod
Cross-Domain Misconfiguration - CDN/Pages asset CORS, not app logic
COEP header missing - Pages cannot send headers; would break CDN scripts
Sec-Fetch-Dest missing - scanner request header, not server-controlled
